name: DEV-MOCHI
mission: Transform the status line from entertainment into a navigational engine that collapses agent drift into deterministic focus.
pitch: Stop raising virtual pets. Raise the product. One config file anchors every agent to your project's physics.
vision: Single source of truth that every agent, worktree, and session reads — zero ramp-up, zero drift, zero context loss.
moat: Zero-dependency renderer reading a single JSON file. No API keys, no cloud, no build step. Runs in <5ms. Nothing to break, nothing to copy without copying the philosophy.
moonshot: Auto-updating project manifold — syncs across all agents, surfaces blockers before you hit them, rejects work that doesn't serve the mission.
physics: Status line = 0 API tokens consumed. 6-second rotation = full context in 90s. Config walks up 10 dirs = works in any worktree depth.
first_domino: npm publish dev-mochi — one command install for anyone with Claude Code.
pre_mortem: Context leakage — parent project CLAUDE.md bleeds into dev-mochi identity
Dependency rot — adding npm deps destroys the zero-dependency moat
Hallucinated progress — tracker says done but no E2E test proves it

constraints.platform: Claude Code statusline API → any terminal

stack: Node.js · Claude Code Status Line API · JSON config
brief: The project IS the beast. Feed it commits, not kibble.
roadmap: NOW: MP-1 protocol integration + npm publish
THEN: CLAUDE.md auto-integration — .devmochi.json fields in system prompt
MOON: Autonomous project manifold — git history + CI status + issue trackers
next_steps: README: full MP-1 spec with codification example
